lore.short_description: Clever inventors and tinkerers living in close-knit communities, driven by boundless curiosity, creativity, and an infectious love of life's adventures.
lore.full_text: A constant hum of busy activity pervades the warrens and neighborhoods where gnomes form their close knit communities. Louder sounds punctuate the hum: a crunch of grinding gears here, a minor explosion there, a yelp of surprise or triumph, and especially bursts of laughter. Gnomes take delight in life, enjoying every moment of invention, exploration, investigation, creation, and play.
